title: oestlundia luteorosea
intro: Oestlundia luteorosea, also known as the pale golden-rimmed lichen, is a type of fungus that grows as a lichen in the mountains of North America. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for skin and wound infections. The health benefits of Oestlundia luteorosea include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections in the body. Herbal preparations of Oestlundia luteorosea are typically made into tinctures or salves, which can be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
